perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up POV shot of a woman with long brown hair appearing to hyperventilate with excitement, covering her mouth with her hand. A friend is seen in the background holding a phone. (2) The scene cuts to a POV shot of the woman walking briskly through a modern shopping mall towards an Olive Young store entrance. (3) Chronological shots show her hands quickly picking up skincare and makeup products, including a cushion foundation and serum tubes, and placing them into a grey mesh basket. (4) A close-up shows the woman's face looking extremely determined and serious while browsing. (5) The camera captures the items being processed and bagged at the cashier's counter. (6) The video ends with her walking out of the mall, holding a full Olive Young shopping bag, looking relieved and happy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic dance music (EDM) starts immediately and remains constant throughout the video. (2) Faint ambient sounds of a bustling shopping mall and the rustle of shopping bags are heard underneath the music. (3) A distinct electronic beep sound occurs during the middle of the video, synchronized with the scanning of products at a register. (4) No human vocals are detected throughout the entire duration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV 🇰🇷 在韓國過度換氣的女生' (POV: A girl hyperventilating in Korea) appears as the opening hook. (2) 'OLIVE YOUNG 20分鐘內會打烊' (OLIVE YOUNG Closing in 20 minutes) provides the situational context and urgency. (3) '（人生中最認真的瞬間）' (The most serious moment in life) is a humorous caption overlaying her focused expression. (4) '回血了😍' (Revived/Healed) and '終於可以呼吸了😌' (Finally can breathe) appear at the end to signify emotional relief.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Rapid shopping selection -> Checkout -> Satisfied exit

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female friend in opening, 1 cashier, 1 distant shopper
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, wavy brown hair wearing a light-blue knit cardigan over a patterned top and a pearl necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern, brightly lit shopping mall with white tile floors and the interior of an Olive Young beauty retail store with well-stocked shelves.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video captures a humorous and relatable 'retail therapy' moment for K-beauty fans, depicting the high-stress, high-reward scenario of a last-minute shopping spree at Olive Young in Korea just before closing time. It emphasizes the cultural allure of Korean skincare shopping.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent featuring of the Olive Young store, specific brand products being purchased, and a focus on the shopping 'haul' experience.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Hyperbolic emotional reaction at the start; use of localized Traditional Chinese shopping slang like '回血' (revived).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video aligns with travel-vlogging trends focusing on consumerism and specific retail destinations in Seoul.
